mapper.select: select SEQ , start , end , reliability , stt_text as sttText , train_text as trainText , data_id AS dataId from TB_CS_TRANSCRIPTION where seq = #{seq}

SELECT tr.seq as seq , so.subject as subject , round(tr.start, 2) as start , round(tr.end, 2) as end , tr.stt_text as sttText , tr.train_text as trainText , tr.data_id as dataId , if ( so.trashed_at IS NOT NULL, 'N', if(so.deleted_at IS NOT NULL, 'N', tr.use_yn)) AS useYn , date_format(tr.updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d') as updatedAt , ifnull(so.seq, -1) as soundSeq , ifnull(so.file_org_nm,'') AS fileOrgNm , ifnull(so.file_new_nm,'') as fileNewNm , pr.data_id AS prDataId , pr.seq AS prSeq , round(pr.start,2) AS prStart , round(pr.end,2) AS prEnd , ifnull(pr.train_text, '') AS prTrainText , trim(ifnull(pr.use_yn, '')) AS prUseYn , IF ( tr.seq != pr.seq OR tr.train_text != ifnull(pr.train_text, '') OR tr.use_yn != trim(ifnull(pr.use_yn, '')) OR round(tr.start,2) != round(pr.start,2) OR round(tr.end,2) != round(pr.end,2) ,'Y', 'N' ) AS candidate , ( SELECT count(tra.seq) FROM TB_CS_TRANSCRIPTION tra JOIN TB_CS_SOUND soa ON soa.SEQ != -1 AND tra.sound_seq = soa.SEQ LEFT JOIN TB_CS_TRANS_PAIR pra ON pra.data_id != '' AND tra.data_id = pra.data_id WHERE tra.sound_seq != -1
AND ( ( (tra.train_text IS NULL or tra.train_text = '') AND tra.data_id != '' ) OR ( tra.train_text IS NOT NULL AND tra.train_text != ''
) )
AND ( ( (tra.train_text IS NULL or tra.train_text = '') AND tra.data_id != '' ) OR ( tra.train_text IS NOT NULL AND tra.train_text != '' AND ( ( tra.data_id = '' AND if ( soa.trashed_at IS NOT NULL, 'N', if(soa.deleted_at IS NOT NULL, 'N', tra.use_yn)) = 'Y' ) OR ( tra.data_id != '' AND IF (tra.seq != pra.seq OR tra.train_text != ifnull(pra.train_text, '') OR tra.use_yn != trim(ifnull(pra.use_yn, '')) OR round(tra.start, 2) != round(pra.start, 2) OR round(tra.end, 2) != round(pra.end, 2), 'Y', 'N') = 'Y' ) ) ) )
AND ( soa.trashed_at is null and soa.deleted_at is null and ( tra.train_text is not null or tra.train_text != '' -- or tra.data_id != '' ) )
AND tra.updated_at BETWEEN DATE(#{search.searchStartDate}) AND DATE_ADD(#{search.searchEndDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY )
AND ( (#{search.useYn} = 'N' AND tra.use_yn = 'N' AND tra.data_id IS NOT NULL AND tra.data_id != '') OR (#{search.useYn} = 'Y' AND tra.use_yn = 'N' AND (tra.data_id IS NULL OR tra.data_id = '')) OR (#{search.useYn} = 'T' AND tra.use_yn = 'Y' AND (tra.data_id IS NULL OR tra.data_id = '')) )
AND ( soa.file_org_nm like CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR tra.stt_text like CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR tra.train_text like CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') )
) AS hiddenCount FROM TB_CS_TRANSCRIPTION tr JOIN TB_CS_SOUND so ON so.SEQ != -1 AND tr.sound_seq = so.SEQ LEFT JOIN TB_CS_TRANS_PAIR pr ON pr.data_id != '' AND tr.data_id = pr.data_id WHERE tr.sound_seq != -1
AND (( (tr.train_text IS NULL or tr.train_text = '') AND tr.data_id != '' ) OR (tr.train_text IS NOT NULL AND tr.train_text != '' ) )
AND (( (tr.train_text IS NULL or tr.train_text = '') AND tr.data_id != '' )OR (tr.train_text IS NOT NULL AND tr.train_text != '' AND ((tr.data_id = '' AND if(so.trashed_at IS NOT NULL, 'N', if(so.deleted_at IS NOT NULL, 'N', tr.use_yn)) = 'Y' )OR (tr.data_id != '' AND IF(tr.seq != pr.seq OR tr.train_text != ifnull(pr.train_text, '') OR tr.use_yn != trim(ifnull(pr.use_yn, '')) OR round(tr.start, 2) != round(pr.start, 2) OR round(tr.end, 2) != round(pr.end, 2), 'Y', 'N') ='Y') ) ) )
AND ( so.trashed_at is null and so.deleted_at is null and ( tr.train_text is not null or tr.train_text != '' -- or tr.data_id != '' ) )
AND tr.updated_at BETWEEN DATE(#{search.searchStartDate}) AND DATE_ADD(#{search.searchEndDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY )
AND ( (#{search.useYn} = 'N' AND tr.use_yn = 'N' AND tr.data_id IS NOT NULL AND tr.data_id != '') OR (#{search.useYn} = 'Y' AND tr.use_yn = 'N' AND (tr.data_id IS NULL OR tr.data_id = '')) OR (#{search.useYn} = 'T' AND tr.use_yn = 'Y' AND (tr.data_id IS NULL OR tr.data_id = '')) )
AND ( so.file_org_nm like CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR tr.stt_text like CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR tr.train_text like CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') )
order by so.created_at desc, tr.start asc
limit #{offsetPageable.offset}, #{offsetPageable.pageSize}

SELECT tr.seq as seq , round(tr.start, 2) as start , round(tr.end, 2) as end , tr.stt_text as sttText , tr.train_text as trainText , tr.data_id as dataId , if ( so.trashed_at IS NOT NULL, 'N', if(so.deleted_at IS NOT NULL, 'N', tr.use_yn)) AS useYn , date_format(tr.updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d') as updatedAt , ifnull(so.seq, -1) as soundSeq , ifnull(so.file_org_nm,'') AS fileOrgNm , ifnull(so.file_new_nm,'') as fileNewNm , pr.data_id AS prDataId , pr.seq AS prSeq , round(pr.start,2) AS prStart , round(pr.end,2) AS prEnd , ifnull(pr.train_text, '') AS prTrainText , trim(ifnull(pr.use_yn, '')) AS prUseYn , IF ( tr.seq != pr.seq OR tr.train_text != ifnull(pr.train_text, '') OR tr.use_yn != trim(ifnull(pr.use_yn, '')) OR round(tr.start,2) != round(pr.start,2) OR round(tr.end,2) != round(pr.end,2) ,'Y', 'N' ) AS candidate , ( SELECT count(tra.seq) FROM TB_CS_TRANSCRIPTION tra JOIN TB_CS_SOUND soa ON soa.SEQ != -1 AND tra.sound_seq = soa.SEQ LEFT JOIN TB_CS_TRANS_PAIR pra ON pra.data_id != '' AND tra.data_id = pra.data_id WHERE ( ( (tra.train_text IS NULL or tra.train_text = '') AND tra.data_id != '' ) OR ( tra.train_text IS NOT NULL AND tra.train_text != '' AND ( ( tra.data_id = '' AND if ( soa.trashed_at IS NOT NULL, 'N', if(soa.deleted_at IS NOT NULL, 'N', tra.use_yn)) = 'Y' ) OR ( tra.data_id != '' AND IF (tra.seq != pra.seq OR tra.train_text != ifnull(pra.train_text, '') OR tra.use_yn != trim(ifnull(pra.use_yn, '')) OR round(tra.start, 2) != round(pra.start, 2) OR round(tra.end, 2) != round(pra.end, 2), 'Y', 'N') = 'Y' ) ) ) ) AND tra.sound_seq != -1
AND ( tra.train_text is not null or tra.train_text != '' )
AND tra.updated_at BETWEEN DATE(#{search.searchStartDate}) AND DATE_ADD(#{search.searchEndDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY )
AND (soa.file_org_nm like CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%'))
) AS hiddenCount FROM TB_CS_TRANSCRIPTION tr JOIN TB_CS_SOUND so ON so.SEQ != -1 AND tr.sound_seq = so.SEQ LEFT JOIN TB_CS_TRANS_PAIR pr ON pr.data_id != '' AND tr.data_id = pr.data_id WHERE(( (tr.train_text IS NULL or tr.train_text = '') AND tr.data_id != '' )OR (tr.train_text IS NOT NULL AND tr.train_text != '' AND ((tr.data_id = '' AND if(so.trashed_at IS NOT NULL, 'N', if(so.deleted_at IS NOT NULL, 'N', tr.use_yn)) = 'Y' )OR (tr.data_id != '' AND IF(tr.seq != pr.seq OR tr.train_text != ifnull(pr.train_text, '') OR tr.use_yn != trim(ifnull(pr.use_yn, '')) OR round(tr.start, 2) != round(pr.start, 2) OR round(tr.end, 2) != round(pr.end, 2), 'Y', 'N') ='Y') ) ) ) AND tr.sound_seq != -1
AND ( tr.train_text is not null or tr.train_text != '' )
AND tr.updated_at BETWEEN DATE(#{search.searchStartDate}) AND DATE_ADD(#{search.searchEndDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY )
AND (so.file_org_nm like CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%'))
order by so.created_at desc, tr.start asc
limit #{offsetPageable.offset}, #{offsetPageable.pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_CS_TRANSCRIPTION WHERE sound_seq = #{seq} AND ( use_yn = 'Y' OR data_id != '' OR train_text IS NOT NULL )
select SEQ , file_org_nm , file_new_nm , file_conv_nm from TB_CS_SOUND WHERE SEQ = #{seq}
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_CS_TRANSCRIPTION set sound_seq = -1 , use_yn = 'N' where seq = #{seq}
mapper.insert: insert into TB_CS_TRANSCRIPTION ( start , end , reliability , stt_text , meet_text , train_text , sound_seq , tts_seq , meeting_seq , channel_id ) select start , end , reliability , stt_text , meet_text , train_text , #{soundSeq} , -1 , -1 , channel_id from TB_CS_TRANSCRIPTION where meeting_seq = #{seq}
mapper.select:
SELECT tr.seq as seq , round(tr.start, 2) as start , round(tr.end, 2) as end , tr.stt_text as sttText , tr.train_text as trainText , tr.data_id as dataId , tr.use_yn as useYn , date_format(tr.updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d') as updatedAt , ifnull(so.seq, -1) as soundSeq , IFNULL(ti.army_name,"미등록") AS armyName , ifnull(so.file_org_nm,'') AS fileOrgNm , ifnull(so.file_new_nm,'') as fileNewNm , pr.data_id AS prDataId , pr.seq AS prSeq , round(pr.start,2) AS prStart , round(pr.end,2) AS prEnd , ifnull(pr.train_text, '') AS prTrainText , trim(ifnull(pr.use_yn, '')) AS prUseYn , IF ( tr.seq != pr.seq OR tr.train_text != ifnull(pr.train_text, '') OR tr.use_yn != trim(ifnull(pr.use_yn, '')) OR round(tr.start,2) != round(pr.start,2) OR round(tr.end,2) != round(pr.end,2) ,'Y', 'N' ) AS candidate , ( SELECT count(tra.seq) FROM TB_CS_TRANSCRIPTION tra left JOIN TB_CS_SOUND soa ON soa.SEQ != -1 AND tra.sound_seq = soa.SEQ LEFT JOIN TB_CS_TRANS_PAIR pra ON pra.data_id != '' AND tra.data_id = pra.data_id WHERE ( ( (tra.train_text IS NULL or tra.train_text = '') AND tra.data_id != '' ) OR ( tra.train_text IS NOT NULL AND tra.data_id = '' )
or ( pra.data_id != '' AND IF ( tra.seq != pra.seq OR tra.train_text != ifnull(pra.train_text, '') OR tra.use_yn != trim(ifnull(pra.use_yn, '')) OR round(tra.start,2) != round(pra.start,2) OR round(tra.end,2) != round(pra.end,2) ,'Y', 'N' ) = 'Y' )
) and 1 = 1
AND tra.train_text != ''
AND tra.updated_at BETWEEN DATE(#{search.searchStartDate}) AND DATE_ADD(#{search.searchEndDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY )
AND ( (tra.stt_text like CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%')) or (tra.train_text like CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%')) or (soa.file_org_nm like CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%')) )
) AS hiddenCount FROM TB_CS_TRANSCRIPTION tr left JOIN TB_CS_SOUND so ON so.SEQ != -1 AND tr.sound_seq = so.SEQ LEFT JOIN TB_CS_TRANS_PAIR pr ON pr.data_id != '' AND tr.data_id = pr.data_id WHERE ( ( (tr.train_text IS NULL or tr.train_text = '') AND tr.data_id != '' ) OR ( tr.train_text IS NOT NULL AND tr.data_id = '' )
or ( pr.data_id != '' AND IF ( tr.seq != pr.seq OR tr.train_text != ifnull(pr.train_text, '') OR tr.use_yn != trim(ifnull(pr.use_yn, '')) OR round(tr.start,2) != round(pr.start,2) OR round(tr.end,2) != round(pr.end,2) ,'Y', 'N' ) = 'Y' )
) and 1 = 1
AND tr.train_text != ''
AND tr.updated_at BETWEEN DATE(#{search.searchStartDate}) AND DATE_ADD(#{search.searchEndDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY )
AND ( (tr.stt_text like CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%')) or (tr.train_text like CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%')) or (so.file_org_nm like CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%')) )
order by so.file_org_nm desc, tr.start asc
limit #{offsetPageable.offset}, #{offsetPageable.pageSize}

SELECT tr.seq as seq , round(tr.start, 2) as start , round(tr.end, 2) as end , tr.stt_text as sttText , tr.train_text as trainText , tr.data_id as dataId , if ( so.trashed_at IS NOT NULL, 'N', if(so.deleted_at IS NOT NULL, 'N', tr.use_yn)) AS useYn , date_format(tr.updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d') as updatedAt , ifnull(so.seq, -1) as soundSeq , ifnull(so.file_org_nm,'') AS fileOrgNm , ifnull(so.file_new_nm,'') as fileNewNm , pr.data_id AS prDataId , pr.seq AS prSeq , round(pr.start,2) AS prStart , round(pr.end,2) AS prEnd , ifnull(pr.train_text, '') AS prTrainText , trim(ifnull(pr.use_yn, '')) AS prUseYn , IF ( tr.seq != pr.seq OR tr.train_text != ifnull(pr.train_text, '') OR tr.use_yn != trim(ifnull(pr.use_yn, '')) OR round(tr.start,2) != round(pr.start,2) OR round(tr.end,2) != round(pr.end,2) ,'Y', 'N' ) AS candidate , ( SELECT count(tra.seq) FROM TB_CS_TRANSCRIPTION tra JOIN TB_CS_SOUND soa ON soa.SEQ != -1 AND tra.sound_seq = soa.SEQ LEFT JOIN TB_CS_TRANS_PAIR pra ON pra.data_id != '' AND tra.data_id = pra.data_id WHERE ( ( (tra.train_text IS NULL or tra.train_text = '') AND tra.data_id != '' ) OR ( tra.train_text IS NOT NULL AND tra.train_text != '' AND ( ( tra.data_id = '' AND if ( soa.trashed_at IS NOT NULL, 'N', if(soa.deleted_at IS NOT NULL, 'N', tra.use_yn)) = 'Y' ) OR ( tra.data_id != '' AND IF (tra.seq != pra.seq OR tra.train_text != ifnull(pra.train_text, '') OR tra.use_yn != trim(ifnull(pra.use_yn, '')) OR round(tra.start, 2) != round(pra.start, 2) OR round(tra.end, 2) != round(pra.end, 2), 'Y', 'N') = 'Y' ) ) ) ) AND tra.sound_seq != -1
AND ( tra.train_text is not null or tra.train_text != '' )
AND tra.updated_at BETWEEN DATE(#{search.searchStartDate}) AND DATE_ADD(#{search.searchEndDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY )
AND (soa.file_org_nm like CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%'))
) AS hiddenCount FROM TB_CS_TRANSCRIPTION tr JOIN TB_CS_SOUND so ON so.SEQ != -1 AND tr.sound_seq = so.SEQ LEFT JOIN TB_CS_TRANS_PAIR pr ON pr.data_id != '' AND tr.data_id = pr.data_id WHERE(( (tr.train_text IS NULL or tr.train_text = '') AND tr.data_id != '' )OR (tr.train_text IS NOT NULL AND tr.train_text != '' AND ((tr.data_id = '' AND if(so.trashed_at IS NOT NULL, 'N', if(so.deleted_at IS NOT NULL, 'N', tr.use_yn)) = 'Y' )OR (tr.data_id != '' AND IF(tr.seq != pr.seq OR tr.train_text != ifnull(pr.train_text, '') OR tr.use_yn != trim(ifnull(pr.use_yn, '')) OR round(tr.start, 2) != round(pr.start, 2) OR round(tr.end, 2) != round(pr.end, 2), 'Y', 'N') ='Y') ) ) ) AND tr.sound_seq != -1
AND ( tr.train_text is not null or tr.train_text != '' )
AND tr.updated_at BETWEEN DATE(#{search.searchStartDate}) AND DATE_ADD(#{search.searchEndDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY )
AND (so.file_org_nm like CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%'))
order by so.created_at desc, tr.start asc
limit #{offsetPageable.offset}, #{offsetPageable.pageSize}

SELECT tr.seq as seq , round(tr.start, 2) as start , round(tr.end, 2) as end , tr.stt_text as sttText , tr.train_text as trainText , tr.data_id as dataId , tr.use_yn as useYn , date_format(tr.updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d') as updatedAt , ifnull(so.seq, -1) as soundSeq , ifnull(so.file_org_nm,'') AS fileOrgNm , ifnull(so.file_new_nm,'') as fileNewNm , pr.data_id AS prDataId , pr.seq AS prSeq , round(pr.start,2) AS prStart , round(pr.end,2) AS prEnd , ifnull(pr.train_text, '') AS prTrainText , trim(ifnull(pr.use_yn, '')) AS prUseYn , if ( tr.use_yn = 'N' AND tr.data_id = '', 'N', IF ( tr.seq != pr.seq OR tr.train_text != ifnull(pr.train_text, '') OR tr.use_yn != trim(ifnull(pr.use_yn, '')) OR round(tr.start,2) != round(pr.start,2) OR round(tr.end,2) != round(pr.end,2) ,'Y', 'N' ) ) AS candidate , ( SELECT count(tra.seq) FROM TB_CS_TRANSCRIPTION tra left JOIN TB_CS_SOUND soa ON tra.sound_seq = soa.SEQ LEFT JOIN TB_CS_TRANS_PAIR pra ON tra.data_id = pra.data_id WHERE ( tra.train_text IS NOT NULL AND tra.train_text != '' OR tra.train_text = '' AND pra.data_id IS NOT NULL ) AND tra.sound_seq != -1
AND tra.updated_at BETWEEN DATE(#{search.searchStartDate}) AND DATE_ADD(#{search.searchEndDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY )
AND ( if ( tra.use_yn = 'N' AND tra.data_id = '', 'N', IF ( tra.seq != pra.seq OR tra.train_text != ifnull(pra.train_text, '') OR tra.use_yn != trim(ifnull(pra.use_yn, '')) OR round(tra.start, 2) != round(pra.start, 2) OR round(tra.end, 2) != round(pra.end, 2) ,'Y', 'N' ) ) = #{search.candidate} )
AND (soa.file_org_nm like CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%'))
) AS hiddenCount FROM TB_CS_TRANSCRIPTION tr left JOIN TB_CS_SOUND so ON tr.sound_seq = so.SEQ LEFT JOIN TB_CS_TRANS_PAIR pr ON tr.data_id = pr.data_id WHERE ( tr.train_text IS NOT NULL AND tr.train_text != '' OR tr.train_text = '' AND pr.data_id IS NOT NULL ) AND tr.sound_seq != -1
AND tr.updated_at BETWEEN DATE(#{search.searchStartDate}) AND DATE_ADD(#{search.searchEndDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY )
AND ( if ( tr.use_yn = 'N' AND tr.data_id = '', 'N', IF ( tr.seq != pr.seq OR tr.train_text != ifnull(pr.train_text, '') OR tr.use_yn != trim(ifnull(pr.use_yn, '')) OR round(tr.start, 2) != round(pr.start, 2) OR round(tr.end, 2) != round(pr.end, 2) ,'Y', 'N' ) ) = #{search.candidate} )
AND (so.file_org_nm like CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%'))
order by so.created_at desc, tr.start asc
limit #{offsetPageable.offset}, #{offsetPageable.pageSize}
mapper.update:
UPDATE TB_CS_TRANSCRIPTION SET use_yn = 'N' WHERE SEQ in
#{item}

UPDATE TB_CS_TRANS_PAIR SET model_id = '' WHERE seq in
#{item}

UPDATE TB_CS_TRANSCRIPTION SET use_yn = 'Y',data_id ='' WHERE SEQ in
#{item}
mapper.select: select data_id as dataId , seq as seq , train_text as trainText , use_yn as useYn from TB_CS_TRANS_PAIR where data_id = #{dataId}

SELECT tr.seq as seq , round(tr.start, 2) as start , round(tr.end, 2) as end , so.subject as subject , kw.keyword_text as keywordText , kw.tts_text as ttsText , tr.stt_text as sttText , ifnull(tr.train_text, kw.tts_text) as trainText , tr.data_id as dataId , tr.use_yn AS useYn , date_format(tr.updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d') as updatedAt , ifnull(so.seq, -1) as soundSeq , ifnull(kw.seq, -1) as ttsSeq , ifnull(kw.file_org_nm,'') AS fileOrgNm , ifnull(kw.file_new_nm,'') as fileNewNm , pr.data_id AS prDataId , pr.seq AS prSeq , round(pr.start,2) AS prStart , round(pr.end,2) AS prEnd , ifnull(pr.train_text, '') AS prTrainText , trim(ifnull(pr.use_yn, '')) AS prUseYn , IF ( tr.seq != pr.seq OR tr.train_text != ifnull(pr.train_text, '') OR tr.use_yn != trim(ifnull(pr.use_yn, '')) OR round(tr.start,2) != round(pr.start,2) OR round(tr.end,2) != round(pr.end,2) ,'Y', 'N' ) AS candidate , ( SELECT count(tra.seq) FROM TB_CS_TRANSCRIPTION tra JOIN TB_CS_TTS_KEYWORD kwa on kwa.seq != -1 AND kwa.seq = tra.tts_seq JOIN TB_CS_TTS soa on soa.seq != -1 and kwa.tts_seq = soa.seq LEFT JOIN TB_CS_TRANS_PAIR pra ON tra.data_id = pra.data_id WHERE tra.tts_seq != -1
AND kwa.trashed_at is null and kwa.deleted_at is null AND tra.train_text != ''
AND ( ( (tra.train_text IS NULL or tra.train_text = '') AND tra.data_id != '' ) OR ( tra.train_text IS NOT NULL AND tra.train_text != '' AND ( ( tra.data_id = '' AND if ( kwa.trashed_at IS NOT NULL, 'N', if(kwa.deleted_at IS NOT NULL, 'N', tra.use_yn)) = 'Y' ) OR ( tra.data_id != '' AND IF (tra.seq != pra.seq OR tra.train_text != ifnull(pra.train_text, '') OR tra.use_yn != trim(ifnull(pra.use_yn, '')) OR round(tra.start, 2) != round(pra.start, 2) OR round(tra.end, 2) != round(pra.end, 2), 'Y', 'N') = 'Y' ) ) ) )
AND ( tra.train_text IS NOT NULL AND tra.train_text != '' OR tra.train_text = '' AND pra.data_id IS NOT NULL )
AND tra.updated_at BETWEEN DATE(#{search.searchStartDate}) AND DATE_ADD(#{search.searchEndDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY )
AND ( (#{search.useYn} = 'N' AND tra.use_yn = 'N' AND tra.data_id IS NOT NULL AND tra.data_id != '') OR (#{search.useYn} = 'Y' AND tra.use_yn = 'N' AND (tra.data_id IS NULL OR tra.data_id = '')) OR (#{search.useYn} = 'T' AND tra.use_yn = 'Y' AND (tra.data_id IS NULL OR tra.data_id = '')) )
AND ( kwa.keyword_text like CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR kwa.keyword_sound like CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR kwa.tts_text like CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR tra.train_text like CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') )
) AS hiddenCount FROM TB_CS_TRANSCRIPTION tr JOIN TB_CS_TTS_KEYWORD kw on kw.seq != -1 AND kw.seq = tr.tts_seq JOIN TB_CS_TTS so on so.seq != -1 and kw.tts_seq = so.seq LEFT JOIN TB_CS_TRANS_PAIR pr ON tr.data_id = pr.data_id WHERE tr.tts_seq != -1
AND ( tr.train_text IS NOT NULL AND tr.train_text != '' OR tr.train_text = '' AND pr.data_id IS NOT NULL ) AND kw.trashed_at is null and kw.deleted_at is null AND tr.train_text != ''
AND (( (tr.train_text IS NULL or tr.train_text = '') AND tr.data_id != '' )OR (tr.train_text IS NOT NULL AND tr.train_text != '' AND ((tr.data_id = '' AND if(kw.trashed_at IS NOT NULL, 'N', if(kw.deleted_at IS NOT NULL, 'N', tr.use_yn)) = 'Y' )OR (tr.data_id != '' AND IF(tr.seq != pr.seq OR tr.train_text != ifnull(pr.train_text, '') OR tr.use_yn != trim(ifnull(pr.use_yn, '')) OR round(tr.start, 2) != round(pr.start, 2) OR round(tr.end, 2) != round(pr.end, 2), 'Y', 'N') ='Y') ) ) )
AND ( tr.train_text IS NOT NULL AND tr.train_text != '' OR tr.train_text = '' AND pr.data_id IS NOT NULL )
AND tr.updated_at BETWEEN DATE(#{search.searchStartDate}) AND DATE_ADD(#{search.searchEndDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY )
AND ( (#{search.useYn} = 'N' AND tr.use_yn = 'N' AND tr.data_id IS NOT NULL AND tr.data_id != '') OR (#{search.useYn} = 'Y' AND tr.use_yn = 'N' AND (tr.data_id IS NULL OR tr.data_id = '')) OR (#{search.useYn} = 'T' AND tr.use_yn = 'Y' AND (tr.data_id IS NULL OR tr.data_id = '')) )
AND ( kw.keyword_text like CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR kw.keyword_sound like CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR kw.tts_text like CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR tr.train_text like CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') )
order by so.created_at desc, tr.start asc
limit #{offsetPageable.offset}, #{offsetPageable.pageSize}
